use_cases: Tab navigation to switch between content panels in dashboard interfaces
Action buttons for triggering events in SaaS applications
Navigation controls for organizing content sections on landing pages
Interactive form submission buttons for e-commerce checkout flows
Tab switching for settings and configuration panels in dev tools
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple variants and sizes, designed for tab navigation systems. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and includes accessibility-focused focus-visible states for keyboard navigation. Supports asChild prop for polymorphic rendering.
